title: Agent Toolkit for AWS Explained in 2 Minutes
summary: Agent Toolkit for AWS equips AI coding agents with up-to-date documentation, best practices, and tested procedures for AWS services. It improves success rates and reduces wasted effort by supplementing agents' general knowledge with current information and guardrails.
writeup: This short video from AWS Developers introduces Agent Toolkit for AWS, which supplies AI coding agents with up-to-date documentation, best practices, and tested procedures for AWS services. The toolkit supplements an agent's general knowledge with current information and guardrails, addressing the gap between a model's training data and the present state of AWS services. The stated payoff: higher success rates and less wasted effort when agents work against AWS.
